sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Restore
action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 51, 'col': 15}])

# Move cursor to col 36 (LEFT once)
action([{'action': 'LEFT'}])

# Click all 5 non-cross cells in one batch
# (0,0), (0,2), (1,1), (2,0), (2,2)
action([
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 51, 'col': 26},  # (0,0)
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 51, 'col': 36},  # (0,2)
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 54, 'col': 29},  # (1,1)
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 57, 'col': 26},  # (2,0)
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 57, 'col': 36},  # (2,2)
])

seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("After clicking all 5 non-cross cells:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['pixels'] == 9:
        b = n['boundary']
        r = (min([p[0] for p in b]) - 49) // 5
        c = (min([p[1] for p in b]) - 24) // 5
        print(f"  ({r},{c}): {n['color']}")
print(f"Done: {last_action_result.get('done')}, Level completed: {last_action_result.get('level_completed')}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
